title: Christopher Manning and Ph.D. Students' Dissertations
text:
# Christopher Manning and Ph.D. Students’ Dissertations

Prakash Kagitha made a visualization of [my Ph.D. descendants who are on OpenReview](https://prakashkagitha.github.io/manningphdtree/) .

|0\. [Christopher Manning](https://nlp.stanford.edu/~manning/) . 1994-12. _Ergativity: Argument Structure and Grammatical Relations._ Ph.D. thesis, Stanford University, Department of Linguistics. xiv+282
pp. (Advised by [Joan Bresnan](https://web.stanford.edu/~bresnan/) – see also my academic ancestors .)  
_<https://nlp.stanford.edu/~manning/dissertations/Manning-Christopher-ergativity-1994.pdf>_ |[](https://nlp.stanford.edu/~manning/) |[](https://nlp.stanford.edu/~manning/dissertations/Manning-Christopher-ergativity-1994.pdf) |[](https://nlp.stanford.edu/~manning/dissertations/Manning-Christopher-ergativity-1994.pdf) |[](https://nlp.stanford.edu/~manning/dissertations/Manning-Christopher-ergativity-1994.pdf) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

University of Sydney, Department of Linguistics. vii+300 pp. (Co-advised by Toni Borowsky and Jane Simpson.)

## Christopher Manning ’s academic ancestors’ dissertations

|−1. [Joan Bresnan](https://web.stanford.edu/~bresnan/) . 1972. _Theory of complementation in English syntax._ Ph.D. thesis,
Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Department of Foreign Literatures and Linguistics. 321
pp.  
_<https://nlp.stanford.edu/~manning/dissertations/26083031-MIT-Joan-Bresnan-PhD.pdf>_ |
| --- |
|−2. [Noam Chomsky](https://chomsky.info/) . 1955. _Transformational Analysis._ Ph.D. thesis,
University of Pennsylvania, Department of Linguistics. xiii+175 pp. |
|−3. [Zellig S. Harris](https://zelligharris.org/) . 1934. _A Grammar of the Phoenician Language._ Ph.D. thesis,
University of Pennsylvania.  
_https://nlp.stanford.edu/~manning/dissertations/A-Grammar-of-the-Phoenician-Language-Zellig-Harris.pdf_ |
|−4. [James Alan Montgomery](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/James_Alan_Montgomery) . 1904. _The Samaritans, The Earliest Jewish Sect: Their History, Theology, and Literature._ Ph.D. thesis, University of Pennsylvania.  
_https://nlp.stanford.edu/~manning/dissertations/Montgomery-The-Samaritans.pdf_ |
|−5. [Hermann Vollrat Hilprecht](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hermann_Volrath_Hilprecht) . 1883. _Freibrief Nebukadnezar's I, Königs von Babylonien c. 1130 v. Chr. zum ersten Mal veröffentlicht, umschrieben und übersetzt_ [Charter of Nebuchadnezzar I, king of Babylonia c. 1130 BC, published, paraphrased and translated for the first time]. Dr. phil. dissertation, Universität Leipzig. |
|−6. [Friedrich Delitzsch](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Friedrich_Delitzsch) . 1873. _Studien über indogermanisch-semitische
Wurzelverwandschaft_ [Studies on the relationship between
Indo-European and Semitic roots]. Dr. phil. dissertation,
Universität Leipzig.  
_https://nlp.stanford.edu/~manning/dissertations/Friedrich-Delitzsch-PhD.pdf_ |
|_For more history, see [Linguistree Academic Genealogy](https://academictree.org/linguistics/tree.php?pid=31399) ._ |
